LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.GameNotReady: Game is not ready for rescue requests.
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.CooldownActive: !rescueme is on cooldown or event limits are full. Try again later.
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.NoAssignment: You do not have an assigned pawn. Use !pawn to buy one first.
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.Missing: Your pawn assignment is missing from the world (stale ID). Ask the streamer, or buy a new pawn with !pawn.
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.AlreadySafe: {0} is already safe with the colony on {1}.
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.NoMap: No colony map is available for drop-pod return.
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.DropFailed: Could not drop {0} back to the colony.
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.DropSuccess: {0} is returning to {1} by drop pod!
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.DropSuccessFallback: Could not open a field site; extracted {0} directly.
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.MissionFailed: Could not create a rescue mission. Try again later.
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.MissionSuccess: Rescue mission for {0} (held by {1}) is on the world map. Send a caravan!
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.StatusCaptured: {0} is CAPTURED by {1}. !rescueme will open a world rescue site (costs coins).
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.StatusLeftBehind: {0} is left behind (not captive). !rescueme will drop-pod them home (costs coins).
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.Letter.DropBody: {0} paid to extract {1}. They are dropping near the colony on {2} at ({3}, {4}).
LanguageData.RICS.RMCH.Letter.MissionBody: {0} paid for intel on {1}, held by {2}. A rescue camp is marked on the world map. Travel there, free them, and they will join.
